falsification_conditions.condition: S&P 500 Index closes below 4,000 for 3 consecutive trading days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A sustained breakdown below this level would contradict the bottom pattern and indicate continued bearish momentum, invalidating the HOLD signal.

falsification_conditions.condition: VIX Volatility Index surges above 35 for 5 consecutive sessions
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Such extreme volatility would suggest market panic and a blowoff top scenario, directly opposing the expected bottom pattern and falsifying the current UNKNOWN verdict.

falsification_conditions.condition: U.S. Non-Farm Payrolls report shows job losses exceeding 200,000 in a single month
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This would indicate severe economic deterioration, contradicting the implied market bottom and proving the HOLD signal incorrect through fundamental data.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
